Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Solstice]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 41''' — Solstice is an organization mentioned by Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — Solstice is a secret organization that controls the Galactic Union.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 5''' — Solstice is an entity that Omega wants to defeat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — Solstice was one of the groups Starhammer fought during his conquest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — Solstice has an information network that dwarfs any corporations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — Solstice is an organization that puppeteers the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Solstice blew up their own ships to force a fight.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — Solstice stole freedom from average citizens across hundreds of planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — Solstice may have been trying to catch the speaker in a web.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — Information learned on the ship might be sent back to Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — Solstice is a target mentioned by Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — Solstice is an enemy described as a specter with no form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — Solstice is a location where Benri is being welcomed.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Solstice is a location that requires someone from Planetary Security to operate out of Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — A huge man intended to meet Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — Solstice is a group willing to sacrifice their own men and use proton bombs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Solstice is a mysterious shadow organization.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Solstice has members everywhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Solstice can hire entire crews for projects off the books.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Solstice can order Union fleets without repercussions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — Solstice is a location from which a console was stolen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — The crew is going up against Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — Solstice is an individual with a scheduled appointment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — Solstice is an entity that might use sources to infiltrate ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Solstice is an entity or person that the Vallenar Corporation may want to show their power to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Sola asks what Solstice wants in the Dornoth system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — Solstice is a name or entity that analysts are looking for signs of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — Solstice is rooted in the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Solstice sent Aila's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Solstice left tracks in the snow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Solstice is an organization that has a representative known as the Voice of Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Solstice prevented The Last Horizon from following Benri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Solstice is a group or entity in custody.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Solstice is an enemy that Omega holds a bleak hatred for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Shyrax has a contract with Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — The Zenith Processor and Solstice may use contracts that cannot be broken.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — Shyrax fulfilled her side of a bargain with Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Solstice has resources to contact Benri directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Solstice has a representative.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Solstice is a former employer of Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Solstice is keeping information under control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — The contract requires the trade of a data core to Solstice in exchange for hostages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Solstice is a tool or power the narrator can use, but cannot keep up indefinitely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — The narrator wants to keep the data core out of Solstice's hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Crossing Solstice has severe consequences.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Solstice is a group that includes Aila.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — The fight against Solstice is considered a war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Solstice uses human shields to paralyze enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — Solstice is a real threat to the citizens of the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Solstice is an entity Benri Vallenar maintains a reputation with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Solstice can wink out of existence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Solstice is a character who tests Sola's family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 35''' — Solstice sets traps.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Solstice is someone Omega has been trying to forget.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Solstice is an enemy mentioned by Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — The leaders of Solstice were not involved in the store explosion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 38''' — Void Prism addressed the ladies and gentlemen of Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The plan and design for the victory came from Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Solstice controls the exit of the caverns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Solstice has a high command.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Solstice has betrayed Benri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Solstice is backed by the World Spirit of Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Solstice is a group of World Spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Solstice is a group whose location was identified via the Zykaros system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Solstice was tracked to Zykaros.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Solstice is a person or entity that may be complicit with Zykaros.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — Solstice is a group that aims to take over the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Solstice is a person Omal Escalon addressed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Solstice is an entity or person that people work for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Solstice is a group of World Spirits that have turned against their mortal population.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Solstice rules from the shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Omega regretted never being able to kill Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Solstice was the subject of a request by Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — The narrator cursed Solstice.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
